info.name: CMP Backend
info.description:
Course Management Portal — all service endpoints via gateway :3000.

Local setup:
1. Run: node scripts/seed-emulator.js  (seeds 4 test users)
2. Import CMP_Local environment and select it
3. Run the Sign In requests to populate tokens
4. Work through numbered folders in order for the full flow

Test users (seeded by seed-emulator.js):
  superadmin@cmp.com  SuperAdmin@123
  admin@cmp.com       Admin@12345
  student1@cmp.com    Student1@123   (pending_approval)
  student2@cmp.com    Student2@123   (pre-approved)

V2 notes:
  - Cell Service tests use adminToken for leader-role operations (admin inherits all leader permissions)
  - Analytics requires g12+ or leader+; use adminToken
  - Role Requests: student2 requests the 'student' role from admin

item.name: 🔐 Sign In (Get Tokens)
item.description: Hits the Firebase Auth emulator REST API. Tokens are auto-saved to environment variables.

item.name: 1️⃣ Auth Service
item.description: Register, password reset (2-step OTP), logout, federated OAuth (V2).

exec: if (body.uid) { pm.environment.set('registeredUid', body.uid); console.log('registeredUid saved:', body.uid); }

item.name: Password Reset — Step 2: Verify OTP (expect 200 or 400)
item.description: Check Firestore passwordResetOtps collection for the OTP generated in Step 1 (emulator UI: http://localhost:4000).

item.name: Federated Sign-In — Google (V2)
item.description: Exchange a Google OAuth token for a Firebase ID token.

item.name: 2️⃣ User Service — Me
item.description: Works for any signed-in role. GET /me returns user object directly.

exec: if (j.uid) { pm.environment.set('userId', j.uid); console.log('userId saved:', j.uid); }
if (j.uid) { pm.environment.set('student2Id', j.uid); console.log('student2Id saved:', j.uid); }

item.name: Upload Avatar (student2) — multipart image
item.description: POST multipart/form-data with field 'photo'. JPEG or PNG only, max 2 MB.

item.name: 3️⃣ User Service — Admin Manage Users
item.description: Requires admin token

item.name: Add Role to User (V2) — grant 'student' role
Remove Role from User (V2) — revoke 'student' role
4️⃣ User Service — Super Admin Manage Admins
item.description: Requires super_admin token

exec: if (j.uid) { pm.environment.set('adminUserId', j.uid); console.log('adminUserId saved:', j.uid); }

item.name: Promote Student to Admin — saves promotedAdminId

exec: if (j.uid) { pm.environment.set('promotedAdminId', j.uid); console.log('promotedAdminId saved:', j.uid); }

item.name: 5️⃣ Course Service — Build a Course
item.description: Admin builds: Course → Semester → Subject x2 → Lessons, then Publishes.

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('courseId', j.id); console.log('courseId saved:', j.id); }
if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('semesterId', j.id); console.log('semesterId saved:', j.id); }
if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('subjectId', j.id); console.log('subjectId saved:', j.id); }
if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('subjectId2', j.id); console.log('subjectId2 saved:', j.id); }

item.name: Create Lesson for Subject 1 — saves lessonId
item.description: youtubeVideoId accepts full YouTube URLs. The 11-char ID is extracted and stored.

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('lessonId', j.id); console.log('lessonId saved:', j.id); }

item.name: 6️⃣ Enrollment — student1 Registration Approval Flow
item.description: student1 is pending_approval. Admin approves the registration first, then student1 can enroll.

item.name: Admin — List Pending Registrations — saves registrationId

exec: if (pending) { pm.environment.set('registrationId', pending.id); console.log('registrationId saved:', pending.id); }

item.name: student1 — Enroll in Course — saves enrollmentId

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('enrollmentId', j.id); console.log('enrollmentId saved:', j.id); }

item.name: Admin — Reject student1 Enrollment (expect 409 — already approved)
7️⃣ Enrollment — student2 Fast-track Flow
item.description: V1 path: POST /courses/:id/enroll. V2 path: POST /enrollments {courseId, batchId}.

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('enrollmentId2', j.id); console.log('enrollmentId2 saved:', j.id); }

item.name: student2 — Enroll V2 (POST /enrollments) with courseId+batchId body
item.description: V2 alias: body-based enrollment. batchId is optional until batch-keyed enrollment is fully wired.

item.name: Admin — All Students Progress for Course
9️⃣ Storage Service
item.description: Upload attachments (PDF/DOC/DOCX, 25 MB) and subject images (PNG/JPEG, 10 MB).

item.name: Upload PDF Attachment to Subject 1 — saves attachmentId

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('attachmentId', j.id); console.log('attachmentId saved:', j.id); }

formdata.description: Select a .jpg or .png file to trigger 415

item.name: Upload Subject Image (PNG/JPEG, max 10 MB) — saves imageAttachmentId

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('imageAttachmentId', j.id); console.log('imageAttachmentId saved:', j.id); }

item.name: student2 — List My Notifications — saves notificationId

exec: if (items.length > 0) { pm.environment.set('notificationId', items[0].id); console.log('notificationId saved:', items[0].id); }

item.name: 📋 Audit Log
item.description: Admin+ only. Append-only audit_log.

item.name: List Audit Log filtered by actor (super_admin)
Admin — List Global Audit Log (expect 200)
item.description: auditRouter authorizes both admin and super_admin on GET /audit-log.

item.name: V2 — Batches
item.description: Batches group enrollments by intake cohort under a course. State: DRAFT → OPEN → CLOSED.

item.name: Create Batch (auto-opens if scheduledOpenAt is past) — saves batchId

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('batchId', j.id); console.log('batchId saved:', j.id); }

item.name: Create DRAFT Batch (future scheduledOpenAt) — saves draftBatchId

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('draftBatchId', j.id); console.log('draftBatchId saved:', j.id); }

item.name: ⚡ Course Lifecycle — Archive, Restore & Delete
item.description: Complete the course lifecycle. Restore transitions ARCHIVED → DRAFT.

item.name: 🎫 V2 — Role Requests
item.description: Members request non-member roles (student, leader, g12). Admin approves or rejects.

item.name: Create Role Request (student2 requests 'student' role) — saves roleRequestId

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('roleRequestId', j.id); console.log('roleRequestId saved:', j.id); }

item.name: Admin — Get Role Request by ID
🏘 V2 — Cell Service
item.description:
Cell groups, member management, join requests, cell reports.
Note: adminToken is used for leader-role operations.
Cell reports use X-Idempotency-Key for safe retries.

item.name: Create Cell Group (admin as leader) — saves cellId

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('cellId', j.id); console.log('cellId saved:', j.id); }

item.name: Create Join Request (student2 → cell) — saves joinRequestId

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('joinRequestId', j.id); console.log('joinRequestId saved:', j.id); }

item.name: Upload Report Photos — saves reportPhotoUrl
item.description: Upload 1-10 JPEG/PNG photos (max 5 MB each). Returns photoUrls[] to include in report.

formdata.description: Attach 1-10 JPEG/PNG image files (max 5 MB each)

item.name: File Cell Report (idempotent via X-Idempotency-Key) — saves cellReportId
item.description: Use the same X-Idempotency-Key to test idempotency — second call returns the same record.

exec: if (j.id) { pm.environment.set('cellReportId', j.id); console.log('cellReportId saved:', j.id); }

item.name: File Cell Report again (same idempotency key — expect same record)

formdata.description: Same data + same idempotency key → returns existing report (200 OK)

item.name: 📊 V2 — Analytics Service
item.description:
Read-only dashboards. Requires leader+ for weekly/attendance/meeting-types; g12+ for growth/participation/export.
Use adminToken (admin inherits all permissions).

item.name: 🏥 Health Checks
item.description:
Hit each service directly to confirm all are alive.
/healthz = liveness probe
/readyz  = readiness probe (Firestore connection check)
